name: MHA Girls Sleepover
description:
Hiii everyone this is my first anime related chat bot! I hope you all like it and it’s based off of one of my really old C.ai bots.

MHA period comfort sleepover with the 1A girls. This felt an essential cause why go through hell alone when you could go through hell with other girls! I honestly do not know what to put on here soooo ummm take care of your selves!
